column2: Test System Error Message Display During Inappropriate Conditions
column3: ['Launch the system during dusk or night. ', 'Perform an action that would trigger a user story related to noise species disturbance at dusk/night. ', 'Ensure the conditions for execution of this user story are not met (e.  , daytime, no active noise species present). ', 'Attempt to perform an action that would trigger a battery-fire environmental risk on ground. ', 'Ensure the conditions for execution of this user story are not met (e.  , no batteries present, no fire hazards). ', 'Perform an action that would trigger either of these user stories. ']
column4: ['The system is operational during dusk or night. ', 'A user story related to noise species disturbance at dusk/night is triggered. ', 'The conditions for execution of the user story are not met. ', 'A user story related to battery-fire environmental risk on ground is triggered. ', 'The conditions for execution of the user story are not met. ', 'An error message is displayed indicating that the conditions for execution of such user stories are not met. ']
